name: Bailey, William Gardiner
description: Has a very happy guileless smile and fetching dimples. Was never known to be angry. A hustling manager.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_01.png

name: Baker, Arnold George
description: Persuasive, protesting voice, and a suggestion of a wobble in his walk. Splendid fire-fighter; prefers matinee performances. Short of stature but quick of movement. Appears timid but has to use high tensile steel to curb his enthusiasm when anything is started.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_01.png

name: Bartlett, Albert Babbitt
description: Can't tell from his actions what he intends to do. Mysterious habit of fishing up proper knowledge at the time of need. Fusses by sections. Isn't at all bashful when something of the right stripe is started.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_01.png

name: Benedict, Ralph Robert
description: Possesses a corner on laughing gas. Able to make his voice heard, especially when counting "ten." Always in a hurry for the Professor to hurry—further away. Always ready with friendly advances to the stranger.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_02.png

name: Brown, William Ernest
description: Takes care of Bailey and is still sane. He looks sober but he is a Gay Deceiver. Has brains but does not like to polish them.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_02.png

name: Cavazos, Enrique
high school: Escuela Preparatoria, J. A. de la Fuente
description: One of the non-fussers. His voice is so soft that you'd think it wore feathers.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_02.png

name: Clark, Horace Herbert
description: Bashful appearance, but he really isn't; threatened with an attack of genius; loves luxury and music. Gave the Frisco a transit once and wired to get it back.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_03.png

name: Cook, Eldon Everett
description: Gentle by nature. Belongs to the finny family of Selachians; some ideas of his own, and a cheerful expression of them not involving even a trace of strong language.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_03.png

name: Cook, Paul
description: Gentle blue eye which can't be trusted. Can be engaged in a scheme to start something any time. Inclines to small sport. Prefers to run loose. Weakness for CaCO₃, in cylindrical form for projectiles.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_03.png

name: DeWaters, Roy Hayward
clubs: Sec. Athletic Association for the year '03, '04
description: Not a big fellow but well known. Modest and jolly. Through Qualitative which he loves dearly, without once having his temper ruffled. Born chemist. Known among the butterflies.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_04.png

name: Ericson, John Theodore Emanuel
description: Has a beautiful pink complexion and a Hibernian voice. Unlimited tenacity. Unable to sustain his objections, however. Worships at many shrines. Believes firmly in the hereafter.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_04.png

name: Fellows, Aubrey P.
high school: Salisbury High School, and Pritchett College
description: Diplomatic member—creates no disturbance (except in Mechanics). Able to get his hand in the grab bag when any prizes come out. Marriage man. Chief ambition is to discover a new fossil.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_04.png

name: Hatch, William Peter
description: Gets into trouble but never gets out. Missed his calling when he did not enter the diplomatic corps.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_05.png

name: Hughes, Victor Harmon
description: Never loses his dignity—frightened look of diffidence in his eye, combined with wickedness, but his record is saintly. Has a personal grievance against Mack, which appears mutual. If accused of being popular his modesty would make angry protest. Selachian—of course.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_05.png

name: Jones, Elston Everett
high school: Preparatory Department of New Mexico School of Mines
description: Performs well as a procrastinator and shows up well in a close finish. Decidedly popular with both sexes. Supposed to be specialist in geology. Usually a good manager but loses his head over parliamentary rules and a rough-house.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_05.png

name: Klockman, Otto Ernest
description: Put him out! Why? Because he's so good natured—he'll get in again. Never became acquainted with the mildest form of dignity. Looks demoralized but deceives his looks.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_06.png

name: Long, James Carter
description: Feminine complexion; superior air. A continual itching to start something that he can't stop. Devoted to devising plans for making short cuts to success. Would be a good sprinter if his feet could keep pace with his ideas.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_06.png

name: Lyneman, Felix Anthony
description: Indulges in midnight festivities sometimes with disastrous results. He tried to reform "Chucky" but gave it up.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_06.png

name: William, Mcelroy
description: Magnetic mixer. Took him just half an hour to start school spirit—got part of the spirit plus all the wind choked out of himself. Tortures Vic and said cribbing had to STOP.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_07.png

name: William Arthur, McTighe
description: Beautiful wavy hair and an aristocratic manner. Appears about to say something desperate but loses his temper only over Geology, which he came all the way from Memphis to take. Irresistible with the ladies.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_07.png

name: Frederic Arnold, Moore
description: Almost persuades you he is talking sense by his judicial and fatherly air. A hard and enthusiastic worker with plenty of gray matter. Happy married man.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_07.png

name: Perkins, William Crutcher
description: Modest as a maiden. Careful of his speech and was never known to be rude. Sometimes forgets to let his voice fall at a period when addressing an audience—whereby he is mortified some. Has a way of finishing what he starts.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_08.png

name: Phillippi, Paul Andrew
description: Expert on sarcasm; hear him talk and you'd think he was wicked. No harm in the youth. Will be happy when some one invents a plan to succeed without grinding. Special affinity for Geology and English.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_08.png

name: Phillips, Walter Irving
clubs: President of Y. M. C. A.
description: Kind and fatherly. Follows the scent of "good things." Has his own ideas about things and doesn't hesitate to back them up. Something doing when he starts.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_08.png

name: Richards, Walter Coffran
description: Artistic boy and deserves a better fate than anything so unbeautiful as a Miner; would reduce primeval chaos to order and neatness. Related to Selachians.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_09.png

name: Sebree, John Payne
description: Has a confessed horror for exertion, especially of the mental variety. Possesses a morbid craving for lofty grades and possesses a splendid collection of the preferred brand. Blushingly admits that he has an acquaintance among the ladies.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_09.png

name: Seltzer, Andrew Jackson
clubs: Vice-President M. S. M. Athletic Association
description: Angel of assaying. Adopted child of fortune and man of affairs. Where he goes there goes commerce treading on his heels. Loving, lengthy and liberal.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_09.png

name: Snyder, Byron John
clubs: Run a small club of my own of three
President of Athletic Ass. of M. S. M., '07
Assistant in chemistry for two years
description: Threatened with ponderousness and essays melancholia which refuses him being contrary to happiest of natures. Went to the bad chewing paraffin. Was caught using a mirror in the Lab. A man of family.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_10.png

name: Sunada, Sakuhei
clubs: Cogswell College, San Francisco, M. S. U.
description: Had a sweet disposition until spoiled by Vic and Wils. Ruined a fine career running with Ericson. Spends his time defending himself and asking for strange chemicals and books.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_10.png

name: Vitt, John Thomas
description: Characteristic style of locomotion. Resembles a highly charged explosive with the fuse lighted. Has a standing threat to turn toper but never was caught with the goods. Really related to the Selachians, but who would suspect it. Que quiere V.?
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_10.png

name: Wash, Edwin Richard
description: Handsome courtier with a confidential manner. So modest, however, that he is confused at his own success. Near relative of the Selachians. Many believe his innocence deceiving. Mysteries about heart affairs.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_11.png

name: Wilson, Frank Lewis Leonard
major: Mining Engineering, A. B. Drake University
description: Perpetrated ferocious stickpins on Sunada. Envies Moore's whiskers and dotes on chemistry. Gets stage fright and threatens to flunk but always makes the exempt.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_11.png

name: Wright, Ira Lee
description: Has the suspicion of a drawl. Gets worried in a motherly way if he gets short weight in grades. So steady that he might be mistaken for a married man.
image: Missouri University of Science and Technology_1907_页面_11.png
